subject: [PATCH v3 07/11] mm: handle PMD swap entries in MADV_WILLNEED

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch enhances the handling of PMD swap entries in MADV_WILLNEED operations. It ensures that PMD-sized folios are properly prefetched and avoids unnecessary splitting of PMD swap entries. The patch introduces a new approach to handle PMD swap entries under pmd_trans_huge_lock(), which includes checking for split cache state, zswap entries, or existing PMD-sized folios. If any of these conditions are met, the patch splits the PMD swap entry and asks the walker to retry through the PTE path. Otherwise, it pins the swap device and reads the folio in at PMD order via swapin_sync(). This approach keeps the subsequent fault on the do_huge_pmd_swap_page() path and avoids order-0 readahead unnecessarily splitting the PMD swap entry.
